content.title: English Instructor
content.copy: Personalized coaching for high-agency professionals and students. From Eiken prep to business presentations, I build the systems you need to communicate with confidence.

eiken.student: I need help with my Eiken score!
eiken.juan: No problem. Let's build a system.

travel.student: I'm traveling to London next month!
travel.juan: Exciting! Let's prep your travel English.

business.student: I have a big presentation on Friday.

test_taker.title: The Test-Taker
test_taker.description: Preparing for Eiken, TOEFL, or TOEIC? We don't just 'study'—we build the specific mental models, time-management frameworks, and vocabulary systems needed to crush your target score.

professional.title: The Professional
professional.description: High-stakes presentations, quarterly reviews, or daily international meetings? We refine your professional voice to ensure you command the room. We focus on 'Business EQ'.

explorer.title: The Explorer
explorer.description: Heading abroad for a holiday, a move, or a sabbatical? We focus on practical, high-agency communication. From navigating local logistics to deep-dive conversations.

next_gen.title: The Next Gen
next_gen.description: Building a rock-solid foundation for younger learners. Using high-interest topics and a 'Systems First' approach, we make language acquisition natural and highly effective.

step1.title: The Strategic Audit
step1.label: Step 01: Discovery
step1.description: We start with a high-bandwidth session. No generic tests. We map your professional hurdles, analyze your current output, and identify the high-leverage areas where you need to improve immediately.

step2.title: The Architecture
step2.label: Step 02: Design
step2.description: I build your proprietary roadmap. We set specific, high-agency goals and design the frameworks—vocabulary systems, presentation templates, or mental models—required to get you there.

step3.title: Strategic Execution
step3.label: Step 03: Progress
step3.description: We move into active coaching. This is a feedback-heavy loop where we execute the plan, iterate based on real-world performance, and build the momentum needed for long-term mastery.

testimonials.title: Success Stories
testimonials.subtitle: Proof of the System in Action

hiroki.name: Hiroki T.
hiroki.story: I had almost given up on my TOEFL score after three failed attempts. Juan didn't just teach me English; he taught me a system to manage the test pressure. Knowing he understood my native language gave me the confidence to finally push through.

elena.name: Elena R.
elena.story: Moving abroad is terrifying. Juan coached me through the academic requirements, but having a teacher who actually understood the logistics of a global move made all the difference.

kenji.name: Kenji S.
kenji.story: I needed to lead meetings with our European branch. Juan focused on 'Business EQ'. He understands the nuances of how we communicate, which allowed him to bridge the gap between my thoughts and my English delivery perfectly.

saki.name: Saki W.
saki.story: Most lessons for kids are just games. Juan's approach is different—it's about natural acquisition. My daughter is starting to initiate conversations on her own because the system actually makes sense to her.

yt_challenge.title: Juan & Moe's Language Switch
yt_challenge.desc: Real-time language challenges and breakdown scripts. Seeing the system in action.

english_lab.title: The English Lab (Official)
english_lab.desc: Deep dives into the linguistics and systems behind high-speed language acquisition.

portfolio.title: Product & UX Portfolio
portfolio.desc: The architectural thinking applied to digital products, now applied to language.

behance.title: Behance Case Studies
behance.desc: Visual breakdowns of design systems and brand identities created over the last decade.

medium.title: Medium Blog
medium.desc: Articles on UX, pedagogy, and the intersection of systems architecture and life.

unsplash.title: Unsplash Photography
unsplash.desc: High-quality captures from life in Ishikawa and beyond. 1M+ views globally.

contact.subtitle: Identify your primary bottleneck to begin the architecture shift.

identity.bio: Operating from the coast of Ishikawa. I balance the precision of UX design with high-agency language coaching. I don't just teach English; I build communication systems that scale.

footer.mission: Systems Architect & High-Agency English Coach. Operating at the intersection of design and communication.
